data.name: Vampire Slayer
data.detailed_description:
Other vampire hunters would just slay vampires and get the reward. But this crazy huntress, she was different. She would fight a vampire until it was helpless and weak, and then she would completely subdue it and use for her very own and very dirty purposes. Watch as she enjoys her prey, trampling his hard vampire cock and making him worship her gorgeous feet, then forcing the creature to lick her pussy, and then... Enjoy a glorious graveyard femdom visual novel and see for yourself!

Key Features

• Quad HD (2560x1440 pixels) resolution graphics

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes

• Girl’s and Vampire's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

The Vampire Slayer adult visual novel is inspired by Underworld, an American action horror film series created by Kevin Grevioux, Len Wiseman and Danny McBride.

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Other vampire hunters would just slay vampires and get the reward. But this crazy huntress, she was different. She would fight a vampire until it was helpless and weak, and then she would completely subdue it and use for her very own and very dirty purposes...
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: M1
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
